      "text": "prettinahks/ unn ko wiꞥſch man

tad gahje wiꞥſch Kalnâ.
4. Un Deewß fastappe Bile-
aunu/ unn tas fazzija us winnu:
Septin Altarus efinu es patai-
fijis/ unn weenu Wehrſi/ unn wee-
nu Aunu us ikweenu Altari up-
purejis.
5. Tad likke tas KUNGS to
Wahrdu Bileama Muttê/ unn
fazzija : Greeseß atpakkat us
Balaku/ unn runna ta:
6. Kad nu tas pee winnu at-
greesahs/ redſi/ tad stahweja
wiꞥſch pee fatva Dedsama-Up-
pura/ ar wiſteem Moaba Lee-
leem-Kungeem.
7. Tad fahze wiꞥſch fatvu
Sakkamu-Wahrdu/ unn fazzija :
No Sihrijas irr Balaks tas
Moabiteru Kehniſch mann at-
weddis/ no teem Kalneem prett
Rihtecim (fazzidams:) Nahz/
nolahdi man Jehkabu/ unn nahz/
lamma Israëlu.
8. Ka nolahdefchu es/ ko tas
STIPRAJS DEEWS ne
nolahd/ unn ka launmafchu es/ ko
tas KUNGS ne lamna.
9. Jo no ta Akiniha-Kalnu
Angstuma redsu es winnu/ unn
no trem Pakalneem eerangn es
winnu/ rangi/ tee Laudis dſih-
wohs weeni pascht/ unn ne taps
kihdsinati starp teem Pagaxeem.
10. Kas fcaitihs tohs Jehka-
ba Pibſchlus? jeb to zettortu
Teeſu ta Israëta Bulka? Laid
anna Dwchfele mirſt scho Taif-"

Gals ta irr/ ka winnu (Gals.)
11. Tad fazzija Balaks us
Bileamu: Ko eſti tu man dar-
rijis? Es eſmu teu nehmis man-
nus Eenaidneekus lahdeht/ unn
redſi/ tu eſti tohs fwehtidans
fwehtijis.
12. Tad atbildeja wiꞥſch/ unn
fazzija: Neggi tas man jadar-
ra/ ko tas KUNGS manna
Muttê lizzis irr runnaht?
13. Tad fazzija Balaks us
winnu: Nahz jelle ar man us
weenu zittu Weetu/ no kurrenes
tu winnu redſeht warri/ tew buhs
tikkat winnu Gallu redſeht/ bet
wiſfu ne buhs tew redſeht/ unn no-
lahdi man to no turrenes.
14. Ta nehme wiꞥſch to lihds
us to Tibrunnu Zowim/ us to
Pisgas Wirß-Gallu/ unn uhſtat-
fija feptin Altarus/ unn uppure-
ja weenu Wehrſi/ unn weenu Au-
nu/ us ikweenu Altari.
15. Un wiꞥſch fazzija us Ba-
laku: Paleez ſcheitan pee tawa
Dedsama-Uppura/ es pagaidi-
fchu tur.
16. Tad fastappe tas KUNGS
Bileamu/ unn likke to Wahrdu
winna Muttê/ unn fazzija: Gree-
seß atpakkat pee Balaku/ unn
runna ta.
17. Kad nu wiꞥſch pee to nah-
ze/ tad stahweja wiꞥſch pee fawa
Dedsama-Uppura/ unn tee Moa-
ba Leeli-Kungi pee winnu. Tad
fazzija Balaks us winnu: Ko irr
tas KUNGS runnajiš?
